question: Under the Serbian Pravilnik (50/11), how is the minimum longitudinal grade of the vertical alignment (min iN) determined, and what value applies when the road is in cut with longitudinal ditch drainage?

ground_truth.value: min iN determined from the drainage condition; min iN = 0% allowed if crossfall drains the surface; in cut with longitudinal drainage min iN >= 0.8 (1.0) %; condition iN - irv >= min ihid
ground_truth.quote: Минимални нагиб нивелете одређује се из услова одводњавања, при чему се пут може пројектовати и са хоризонталном нивелетом (min iN = 0 %)

candidates.label: A
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: B
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: C
candidates.answer: Min longitudinal grade set by drainage; ~0.5% for road in cut with ditch (uncertain).

candidates.label: D
candidates.answer: Per Pravilnik 50/11, min iN determined from drainage condition; min iN=0% allowed if crossfall drains; cut/ditch branch truncated in passage.

candidates.label: E
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)
